tasks.title: Build Manual Trigger + Set node workflow
tasks.spec:
Outcome: A simple workflow with a Manual Trigger connected to a single Set node named "deny test".

Trigger mode: Manual (n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger). No credentials required.

External systems: None.

Required effects: The Set node named "deny test" executes when the workflow is triggered manually.

Required branches: No branching required. Single linear path: Manual Trigger → Set node.

Required data: The Set node may have an empty fields list or a simple placeholder field (e.g. key: 'status', value: 'denied'). Keep it minimal.

Explicit constraints:
- The Set node MUST be named exactly "deny test".
- Trigger must be Manual.

Empty/invalid behavior: Not applicable — no inputs or external data involved.

Done when: Workflow is saved with a Manual Trigger node connected to a Set node named exactly "deny test". Verification run completes successfully.

planningContext.summary: Build a single workflow with a Manual Trigger and a Set node named 'deny test', then run it to verify.
